I see....

How many times are you gonna do

whether they have a pulse.
The groom cones out unto the altar. The guests turn toward

This is MAR!i CLEARY, the grandmother of the bride and the
b- matriarch of the Cleary family. Next, two groomsmen walk the
mother of the -bride, KATHLEEN-CLEARY to her seat. She has the

A cute FLOWER GIRL, about seven, walks up the aisle,.

FLOWER GIRL
Step. Step. 'Throw. Step. Step.
Throw.

WOMAN
Oh, you poor dear.
' Jeremy looks at her and does fake sign language to John.

I'm afraid, he can't hear you.
Part of the accident. You here for

WOMAN
Yes, but I have to leave. I've got

Out of her sight, Jeremy mouths "Thank God" tb John.

But I could hang out for a few
minures .

arm) On, poor Shlomo.

.- JOHN
He wants me to take him to the
bathr~om.

My lips.. .
GLORIA
Are my lips?
JERZMY
Yes.

EXT. CHATHAM BEACH CLUB/DECK AREA - CONTINUOUS
John is still with Sec. Cleary. Claire walks up.
SEC. CLEARY
Claire, there's someone I want you
to meet. This is John Ryan.
CLAIRE
We've met. He's psychic.
SEC. CLEARY
Really? Well, maybe he can teil me

Franklin ! Oh, Franklin !

A lot of nice people here.

JEREMY
You're not hearing me. She's a
stage five! A virgin clinger! I'll

John is looking over at Claire and Sack.
JEREMY
(continuing; off
John's look at
Claire)
Give it up already. Her sister
told me she's got a boyfriend.
Tough luck. We all have our bad
days. I need us to leave right now!
Secretary Cleary approaches with Gloria and his wife
SEC. CLEARY
There you two are.
... JEREMY
Actually ... we're about to leave.
It's been a lovely werldlng.
(to Gloria)
I'll call you. It's a promise.

SEC. CLEARY
Nature versus nurture, Lodge.
Nature always wins.
They share another overly-exaggerated manly chortle
SEC. CLZARY
[continuing)
Let's take a daiquiri time-out.

You all right?
JEREMY
Um ... I may need you to perform the

No.
Gloria rushes over with her mother, Kathleen. i
KATHLEEN
Honey, let's take him in the house

Sure, Mom.

Ciaire laughs, then stops herself

Again, I'm sorry, Jeremy. It's

Oh, not just any Buddhist. His

friend.
.- JEREMY
Really? I'm seeing a orthopedist

You' re a homo.

Okay. Mommy, we've had a iong day.

I'll be in my room.
Painting ... homo things.

You go right ahead, Toddy
JOHN,
(to Claire)
So maybe after dinner we could

Wonderful!

GWDPIA CLEARY

(through gritted
teeth to Sack)
Sack...we need to talk about this.
SEC. CLEARY
Well, I am thrilled! Isn't this

(droll, insincere)
Oh, it's a marriage blessed by the

(beat)
Okay, who wants sherbet?

Well it's not a coke spoon!

ELDERLY MAN

money cocksucker!\
The whole restaurant gasps

Does anyone else need anything?
Because I'IT gonna take my break.
